feed.title: John Wry
feed.subtitle: ...because memory does NOT serve me well

entry.title: 1 Timothy Testimonies
entry.summary: 1 Timothy Testimonies Good Morning. Thanks to the DM2 team and brother Oscar for fostering these bible book studies, it really is edifying. Every time we begin the study of a new book, Joshua 1:8 comes to mind: “This book of the law will never leave your mouth, but you will meditate on it day and night, so that keep and do according to all that is written in it; for then you will make your ...

entry.title: Dare I Say Calvinism Is Heresy

link.title: Dare I Say Calvinism Is Heresy

entry.summary: Dare I say Calvinism is Heresy? I just found this quote of Calvin’s in Bob Kirland’s book “None Dare Call it Heresy”. By predestination we mean the eternal decree of God, by which he determined with himself whatever he wished to happen with regard to every man. All are not created on equal terms, but some are preordained to eternal life, others to eternal damnation; and, accordingly, as ea...

entry.title: ¿Como Respondo?
entry.summary: ¿Cómo Respondo? Aveces nos hacen preguntas que son difíciles de responder Las opiniones sobre estos temas son variados y muy discutidos. ¿Que dice la Biblia…? ¿Los niños fallecidos van al cielo? Niños abortados y los de temprana edad Niños mayores con la conciencia formada Salmo 51:5 Yo nací en iniquidad, Y en pecado me concibió mi madre. Romanos 2:6-7 ÉL PAGARÁ A CADA UNO CONF...

entry.title: Gálatas 6:14-18
entry.summary: Gal 6:14 Pero jamás acontezca que yo me gloríe, sino en la cruz de nuestro Señor Jesucristo, por el cual el mundo ha sido crucificado para mí y yo para el mundo. Gal 6:15 Porque ni la circuncisión es nada, ni la incircuncisión, sino una nueva creación. Gal 6:16 Y a los que anden conforme a esta regla, paz y misericordia sea sobre ellos y sobre el Israel de Dios. Gal 6:17 De aquí en adela...

entry.title: Daniel 3:19-30
entry.summary: Furnace Daniel 3:26 - Furnace? Why can they see inside? Maybe more than just a typical furnace? I. Daniel 3:15 “What god is there who can deliver you out of my hands? He was about to get his answer. ​ A. Daniel 3:28 “Blessed be the God of Shadrack, Meshach and Abednego who has sent His angel and deliver His servants who put their trust in Him”. II. Daniel 3:29 “Inasmuch as there is no other...
